title: Thun's Structures
description: Additional new structures in the overworld to refresh the vanilla experience
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/K7BJVFUdki8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 About
This datapack/mod adds an additional 16 new structures in the overworld to refresh the vanilla experience. This datapack is completely vanilla friendly and adds a couple new loot tables!

## 🏢 Structure List
### Structures:
<details>
<summary>List of all structures</summary>
Structures:
  
1. Lighthouse     - Regular/snowy beaches
2. Graveyard      - Mega spruce taiga
3. Oasis          - Deserts
4. Stonehenge     - Plains
5. Jungle Treehouse      - Jungle
6. Moai           - Mooshroom island
7. Witch Hut      - Mangrove Swamp
8. Campsite       - All badlands
9. Observatory    - Stony/frozen/jagged peaks
10. Hobbit Hole   - Meadow & Regular/flower forest
11. Acacia Treehouse  - All savanna
12. Windmill      - All windswept
13. Ice Castle   - All snow biomes
14. Ice Igloo     - All snow biomes
15. Castle - Dark Oak Forest
16. Ship - All non-frozen oceans
</details>

## 🔍 FAQ
### How do I find the structures?
The non cheaty way is to explore the world, each structure has its exclusive biomes and locations! If you're still struggling you can:
1. Use the **```/locate structure thunstructures:<name_of_structure>```** to find your desired structure

2. Alternatively, you can get your **```/seed```** and **upload the datapack file** to the [Minecraft Datapack Map website](https://map.jacobsjo.eu/) and search through it like a regular seed map
### Will the datapack/mod be backported?
Currently I have no plans to backport the datapack or mod, but I will keep adding new structures & dungeons whenever I feel like it
